<!-- Generated by ensemble-pi generator v1.0.0 | Source: check-binding-drift.yaml -->
<!-- Command: ensemble:check-binding-drift | Version: 1.0.0 -->
<!-- Description: Detect drift between a PRD's acceptance-criteria steps and the Reqnroll step bindings on disk -->

# ensemble:check-binding-drift

> **Mission:** Re-derive the step inventory from a PRD's current acceptance criteria and compare it against the [Given/When/Then(@"...")] attributes actually present in the generated Reqnroll step classes. Reports UNBOUND steps (in the PRD but with no binding) and ORPHANED bindings (in code but no longer in the PRD). This is the second tier of requirement traceability: /ensemble:check-feature-drift covers PRD vs .feature, this covers .feature vs the step bindings. The CLI exit code (0 in-sync, 2 drift) lets the same check gate CI or a pre-commit hook.

> **Constraints:**
> - This command is READ-ONLY -- it reports drift and never rewrites .cs, .feature, or project files
> - Comparison runs through the reqnroll-cli helper against the step .cs files -- DO NOT eyeball-diff
> - Matching identity is the normalized step text; a reworded acceptance criterion surfaces as both UNBOUND (new text) and ORPHANED (old text)

## Phase 1: Check

### Step 1: Resolve PRD and project

Determine the PRD and the test project whose bindings to audit

**Actions:**
1. If the user passed a PRD path, use it; otherwise look under docs/PRD/ and ask which to check
2. Pass through --out <dir> (default: tests/) so the correct Steps/ directory is located

### Step 2: Run the drift check

Invoke the deterministic CLI to diff PRD steps against the bindings

**Actions:**
1. Resolve REQNROLL_CLI to first existing path among: ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/lib/reqnroll-cli.js, packages/product/lib/reqnroll-cli.js. If missing, print error and HALT.
2. Run: node "$REQNROLL_CLI" check-binding-drift <prd-path> --json
3. Interpret exit code: 0 = IN_SYNC, 2 = drift detected, 1 = no bindings generated yet

### Step 3: Report and recommend

Explain the drift and how to resolve it

**Actions:**
1. If IN_SYNC: confirm the bindings cover the PRD's steps
2. If UNBOUND: list the steps needing new bindings -- re-run /ensemble:generate-reqnroll-bindings to add stubs (write-once preserves filled bodies)
3. If ORPHANED: list bindings whose acceptance criterion was removed or reworded -- update or delete them
4. If no bindings exist yet: tell the user to run /ensemble:generate-reqnroll-bindings first
